items.text: We just need to keep headed East.
Oh. Okay. How do you know that?

When he locked us up, he was
dressed for travel.
And, about his neck...

You were eyeing his jewelry.
Of course.

In addition to the necklaces he wore
the other day when he hired us,
a new, distinctive leather cord, ...

Oh! Key for a locker?
A locker, in, The Crawler?

items.comment: (Stated simply, as the solution to all their problems.)
